name: Fruit Preserve Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and brown sugar until well blended.
2. Add flour, baking soda, and almond extract; mix until a dough forms.
3. Stir in oats and sliced almonds.
4. Spread mixture evenly in the bottom of a greased 13x9 inch pan.
5. Spread preserves over the dough, stopping about 1/2 inch from the outer edge of the pan.
6. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 22 to 25 minutes.
7. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars. Makes approximately 20 bars.
Note: Experiment with different flavor combinations of extract, nuts, and preserves. Use old-fashioned or quick oats (not instant).
